translations.en: tHomer
translations.zh: 霍默

translations.en: a shifty-eyed character. He carries a cane and walks with a slight limp.
translations.zh: 一名目光閃爍之人，拄杖行走，腳下微跛。

translations.en: "You served your purpose by bringing me the cloak... Now I have no further need of you."
translations.zh: 「汝既已將斗篷送來，便已無用……我再也不需汝了。」

translations.en: "I have big plans now, and no time to waste talking."
translations.zh: 「我有大事將為，無暇與汝多言。」

translations.en: He takes your measure, looking you over from head to toe. "What do you want?"
translations.zh: 他從頭到腳將汝打量一番。「汝有何事？」

translations.en: "Who wants to know?"
translations.zh: 「誰要問？」

translations.en: "Fine, '$Z' - if that's what your name really is... You can call me Homer."
translations.zh: 「也罷，『$Z』——若那真是汝之名……汝可喚我霍默。」

translations.en: "Well, get on with it!"
translations.zh: 「快點說正事！」

translations.en: "I once sailed on the ship called '@Empire,' under Captain @Hawkins."
translations.zh: 「我曾在@Empire（霍金）斯船長手下，於『@Hawkins（帝國）號』上跑船。」

translations.en: "It was wrecked on the cape, southwest of here. Not too far from Serpent's Hold."
translations.zh: 「船於此西南方海角觸礁，離蛇要塞不遠。」

translations.en: His eyes light up with hatred. "That heartless bastard..."
translations.zh: 他雙目燃起恨意。「那無心之雜種……」

translations.en: "He was killed by his own men, and it was no worse than he deserved."
translations.zh: 「他被自家手下所殺，正是罪有應得。」

translations.en: He hesitates, then adds quickly, "Of course, I had nothing to do with it."
translations.zh: 他略一遲疑，急急補道：「自然，此事與我無關。」

translations.en: He regards you warily. "Who sent you?"
translations.zh: 他警覺打量汝。「誰派汝來？」

translations.en: "I see." He screws his face up into an even more suspicious expression than before.
translations.zh: 「我懂了。」他臉色變得更加狐疑。

translations.en: "Just why do you want to know about it, anyway?"
translations.zh: 「汝究竟為何想知此事？」

translations.en: "You're not a member of the @guild. I don't have to tell you anything."
translations.zh: 「汝非@guild（公會）中人。我無須告汝任何事。」

translations.en: "You're looking for the silver tablet? It's part of Captain Hawkin's buried @treasure."
translations.zh: 「汝在找銀板？那是霍金斯船長埋藏的@treasure（寶藏）之一部分。」

translations.en: "It was buried in a small @cave."
translations.zh: 「埋於一小@cave（洞）中。」

translations.en: "Don't know anything about it."
translations.zh: 「對此一無所知。」

translations.en: "What are you talking about?"
translations.zh: 「汝在說啥？」

translations.en: "Go ask Budo. And you didn't hear that from me, understand?"
translations.zh: 「去問布多。但這話可不是從我口中聽來的，懂否？」

translations.en: "Farewell, brother thief."
translations.zh: 「再會了，賊兄。」

translations.en: "Can't say its been a pleasure."
translations.zh: 「不能說是何愉快之事。」

translations.en: "Can't help you there."
translations.zh: 「此事我幫不上忙。」

translations.en: "You've got an awful lot of questions... Maybe I don't care to talk about $Z."
translations.zh: 「汝問題真多……我或許不想談 $Z 此事。」

translations.en: "After Captain Hawkins passed away, we tore his treasure map into nine pieces."
translations.zh: 「霍金斯船長亡後，我等將其寶藏圖撕為九片。」

translations.en: "The plan was, when nobody was looking for us any more, we'd get together and go dig it up."
translations.zh: 「原計畫是：俟風頭過後，我等便聚首掘寶。」

translations.en: "Splitting up the map was my idea - that way nobody could doublecross the others."
translations.zh: 「分圖乃我之主意——如此無人可背叛他人。」

translations.en: "I figure after all these years the others must have given up, so its alright for me to search for the treasure by myself."
translations.zh: 「我想隔了這許多年，其餘人必早已放棄，故我自行尋寶亦無不可。」

translations.en: "Trouble is, I've got a bit of the gout in one leg, and I can't travel much any more."
translations.zh: 「奈何此腿患痛風，已不能長途遠行。」

translations.en: "Maybe we can help each other out."
translations.zh: 「我等或可互相幫襯。」

translations.en: "I know where my piece of the map is hidden, and if you bring me the other eight pieces, perhaps we could make a deal."
translations.zh: 「我知曉自己那片藏處；汝若能將其餘八片帶來，我等或可達成交易。」

translations.en: "I'll tell you all I know about where the pieces might be..."
translations.zh: 「我便將所知告知：各片可能何在……」

translations.en: "Ol' Hawknose set out for the Dry Land, to kill the daemon that is said to live there."
translations.zh: 「老鷹鼻去了乾地，欲除傳說中居於彼處之惡魔。」

translations.en: "Sandy, the ship's cook, went to Trinsic with the first mate."
translations.zh: 「船上廚子桑迪與大副同往川辛。」

translations.en: "Old Ybarra said he was headed for the dungeon Shame, looking for more treasure."
translations.zh: 「老伊巴拉言其欲往恥辱地穴尋更多寶藏。」

translations.en: "I think one of the men died in a shipwreck."
translations.zh: 「其中一人據聞死於沉船。」

translations.en: "Then there was one more... Can't remember his name, but I've heard tell he settled in Jhelom."
translations.zh: 「另有一人……名字我忘了，但聽聞他落腳於哲倫。」

translations.en: "He'll be easy to recognize - he has a hook in place o' one of his hands."
translations.zh: 「他易認得很——一隻手換成了鉤子。」

translations.en: "That's all I know. Perhaps in your travels you can find out where the others have gone."
translations.zh: 「我所知止此。汝行旅之中，或可探得其餘人之去向。」

translations.en: "When you find the pieces, you can lay them out on the ground to see how they fit together."
translations.zh: 「尋得碎片之後，可攤於地上拼湊。」

translations.en: "But remember, only I know where the ninth piece is, so come back here when you've got the other eight."
translations.zh: 「但謹記：唯我知第九片藏處，集齊其餘八片再回此處。」

translations.en: "Have you found the storm cloak yet?"
translations.zh: 「風暴之斗篷可尋著了？」

translations.en: "Then get off your duff and go dig it up!"
translations.zh: 「那便動屁股去挖出來！」

translations.en: "Then hand it over and we're even." His eyes gleam with greedy anticipation.
translations.zh: 「那便交來，我等便兩清。」他雙目閃著貪婪。

translations.en: Do you give him the cloak?
translations.zh: 汝是否將斗篷交予他？

translations.en: "Blast ye! If I still had two good legs, I'd keelhaul the lot of you!"
translations.zh: 「該死！若我兩腿尚好，定將汝等盡綁於船底！」

translations.en: "We had a deal! Besides, I helped steal that treasure myself, fair and square."
translations.zh: 「我等有約！再說那寶藏我自己也親手盜過，公平公道！」

translations.en: "Can't trust anybody these days..."
translations.zh: 「如今真是誰也信不得……」

translations.en: You have no storm cloak to give him.
translations.zh: 汝身上並無風暴斗篷可贈。

translations.en: He takes the cloak from you. "Thanks for keeping your word. There's not many that does, these days..."
translations.zh: 他自汝手中接過斗篷。「謝汝守信。如今守信之人已少……」

translations.en: "So, have ye found the eight pieces of the map yet?"
translations.zh: 「那麼，八片地圖可集齊了？」

translations.en: "Then what are you wasting my time for?"
translations.zh: 「那汝浪費我時間做甚？」

translations.en: "Best count again. You need eight pieces before I'll bargain with you."
translations.zh: 「再數數吧。集齊八片我才與汝談判。」

translations.en: "Very well. I've been thinking about how we could work out a deal."
translations.zh: 「甚好。我一直在想此事如何交易。」

translations.en: "I know you want the silver tablet. Far as I'm concerned, you can have it."
translations.zh: 「我知汝要銀板。對我而言，給汝便是。」

translations.en: "All I really want is the magical cloak that's buried with the rest of the treasure."
translations.zh: 「我所要者，唯是埋於寶藏中之魔法斗篷。」

translations.en: "So I'll tell you where the ninth piece of the map is if you promise to bring me the cloak."
translations.zh: 「故只要汝允諾將斗篷帶回，我便告知第九片之所在。」

translations.en: "The rest of the treasure should be loot enough to satisfy you. Is it a deal?"
translations.zh: 「餘下之寶足夠汝享。成不成交？」

translations.en: "Suit yourself, mate, that's the only deal I'll offer."
translations.zh: 「隨汝便，伙計，我只給這一個價。」

translations.en: "Okay. The ninth piece of the map is hidden..."
translations.zh: 「好。第九片地圖藏處在……」

translations.en: "Right here in my pocket!" He grins wickedly.
translations.zh: 「就在我這口袋裡！」他奸笑一聲。

translations.en: "I had to keep it safe while you were off gathering the others, didn't I?"
translations.zh: 「汝去搜集其餘各片之際，總得有人替其守著吧？」

translations.en: He hands you the last piece of the map.
translations.zh: 他將最後一片地圖交予汝。

translations.en: "The island in the upper left hand corner is Buccaneer's Den."
translations.zh: 「左上角之島乃海盜窟。」

translations.en: "You'll keep your word and come right back here with the magic storm cloak, won't you?"
translations.zh: 「汝會守信，將魔法風暴斗篷帶回此處，是吧？」

translations.en: "Don't want to keep your word now that you have the map, eh?"
translations.zh: 「拿了地圖便不肯履約了，是吧？」

translations.en: "Well, then, I won't tell you where you need to dig to find the treasure!"
translations.zh: 「那好，我便不告汝該往何處挖寶！」

translations.en: "Good. Then I'll tell you this:"
translations.zh: 「好。那我便告知：」

translations.en: "When you reach the island marked with the X, find the three stones and stand in the center."
translations.zh: 「至 X 標記之島後，覓三石而立其中央。」

translations.en: "Then walk three paces due south, nine paces due west, and twelve more paces south."
translations.zh: 「然後向南三步，向西九步，再向南十二步。」

translations.en: "That should put you right next to an old dead tree."
translations.zh: 「便會至一株枯老樹下。」

translations.en: "Dig in the patch of dirt just to the south of you, and you'll find the treasure!"
translations.zh: 「於汝南側之土堆掘之，便可得寶藏！」

translations.en: "Now go get it!"
translations.zh: 「去取吧！」

translator_notes: Homer = 霍金斯船長舊部，藏有第九片寶藏地圖。劇情線：玩家需收集八片，他持有第九片，要求換取風暴斗篷。語氣：狡猾、貪婪、警覺。Buccaneer's Den 沿用『海盜窟』；Shame 沿用『恥辱地穴』（八大地穴對應 Anti-Virtue Pride 的反詞）。
